# Diagram: common/location_service/scripts/transfer_carrier_locations.py


> Auto-generated by Obscura crawlers

## Diagram 1

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  Start([Start]) --> InitSecrets[/"SECRETS = Secrets()"/]
  InitSecrets --> GetConfig{Get DB Config}
  GetConfig --> Connect["fv.db.get_connection(config, DB_APP_NAME)"]
  Connect --> Cursor["fv.db.get_cursor(conn)"]
  Cursor --> ExecVersion["cursor.execute('SELECT version()')"]
  ExecVersion --> FetchVersion["cursor.fetchone() -> print version"]
  FetchVersion --> ExecDB["cursor.execute('SELECT current_database()')"]
  ExecDB --> FetchDB["cursor.fetchone() -> print database"]
  FetchDB --> PrepareInsert["query = cursor.mogrify(INSERT_STMT)"]
  PrepareInsert --> ExecuteInsert["cursor.execute(query)"]
  ExecuteInsert --> PrintInsert["print transferred count/time"]
  PrintInsert --> ExecuteAlias["cursor.execute(ALIAS_STMT)"]
  ExecuteAlias --> PrintAlias["print aliasing time"]
  PrintAlias --> CloseConn([Close connection])
  CloseConn --> End([End])
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
classDiagram
  class Script {
    +SECRETS: Secrets
    +DB_APP_NAME: str
    +INSERT_STMT: SQLQuery
    +ALIAS_STMT: SQLQuery
    +main()
  }
  class Secrets {
    +get_secret(name): dict
  }
  class fv.db {
    +get_connection(config, DB_APP_NAME)
    +get_cursor(conn)
    +q(...): SQLQuery
  }
  class SQLQuery {
    +query_text: str
    +__str__(): str
  }
  Script --> Secrets
  Script --> fv.db
  Script --> SQLQuery
  fv.db --> SQLQuery
```
